explanations.8: The `?.` operator safely accesses nested properties — if `metadata` or `frontMatter` doesn't exist, it returns `undefined` instead of crashing.
explanations.10: This line has backwards logic: it returns `null` (hides the button) when `blueskyRecordKey` EXISTS, which seems intentional but might be confusing at first glance.
explanations.17: This builds a URL by concatenating strings with `encodeURIComponent()`, which converts special characters so they're safe to use in web links.
